channel.title: Comments on: SweetWater 420, Ep. 173
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: iPodder Blog » Beer America TV Podcast
item.dc:creator: iPodder Blog » Beer America TV Podcast
item.description: [...] Pinkerton travel across the country and try out a wide array of different brews and brands. In this featured episode, Paul and John head to Atlanta to visit the SweetWater Brewing Company and find out what makes [...]
item.content:encoded: […] Pinkerton travel across the country and try out a wide array of different brews and brands. In this featured episode, Paul and John head to Atlanta to visit the SweetWater Brewing Company and find out what makes […]
